name: buddyGenAI
description: An app for creating and chatting with AI companions. Name them, describe their personality, generate profile pictures, hear them talk back — it's built around making AI feel less like a tool and more like something you'd actually want to hang out with. Runs locally, privately, or connect to cloud providers.

name: SrcGallery
description: A forkable portfolio generator that pulls your projects straight from GitHub and keeps itself updated. Portfolios are a pain to maintain — so why not let your existing GitHub profile do the work? Fork the repo, deploy, done.

name: Daily False Facts
description: A joke website I originally made around 2012 and rebuilt from the ground up in 2025. It has over 1,000 false facts from the original run, now drip-fed out alongside new ones. It's pointless, and that's the point.

name: aAI-Art
tagline: Generative AI art, the weird way
description: What if instead of generating images with AI, you asked it to describe shapes — and then drew those? This app prompts LLMs to output JSON sprite instructions, which get rendered on a canvas. It's an odd approach to AI art that sidesteps the typical image generation pipeline entirely.
